name: railway-control-room
description: Use Railway from ChatGPT Work through Railway's official remote MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Use Railway without leaving ChatGPT Work.
interface.longDescription: A tiny plugin wrapper around Railway's official remote MCP. Check services, deployments, and logs; Railway handles the OAuth connection.
defaultPrompt: What needs my attention in Railway right now?
Explain why my latest Railway deployment failed.
Show my services and their current deployment health.
